testcase.name: testAsynchronousContinuationMethods
testcase.system-out:
15:54:49.566 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.example.service.CompletableFutureTest]: CompletableFutureTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 15:54:49.730 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.example.DemoApplication for test class com.example.service.CompletableFutureTest 15:54:49.981 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

testcase.name: testSupplyAsyncDemo
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[36m15:54:53&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32msupplyAsyncDemo endpoint executed on thread: main &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:54:53&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mAsync task has completed, result is: supplier executed on thread: ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1 &amp#27;[0;39m

testcase.name: testSequentialAsyncTasksExample
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[36m15:54:53&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32msequentialAsyncTasksExample endpoint executed on thread: main &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:54:53&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mStarting processOrder in thread ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1 &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:54:53&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32msequentialAsyncTasksExample function continuing doing stuff.. executed on thread: main &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:54:58&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mStarting processPayment in thread ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1 &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:03&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mStarting processDelivery in thread ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1 &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:08&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mAll async tasks have completed, final result is: Delivery processed &amp#27;[0;39m

testcase.name: testAsyncExceptionExample
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[36m15:55:08&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32masyncExceptionExample endpoint executed on thread: main &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:08&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mStarting processOrder in thread ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1 &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:13&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mHandling error, result: null, exception: java.util.concurrent.CompletionException: java.lang.RuntimeException: Payment failed &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:13&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mExceptionally() called, exception handled. &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:13&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mFinal result is: Default value &amp#27;[0;39m

testcase.name: testParallelAsyncTasksExample
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[36m15:55:13&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mparallelAsyncTasksExample endpoint executed on thread: main &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:13&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mparallelAsyncTasksExample function continuing doing stuff.. executed on thread: main &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:13&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mStarting getRecommendations in thread ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1 &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:13&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mStarting getTrendingItems in thread ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-2 &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:13&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mStarting getLatestDeals in thread ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-3 &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:18&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mRecommendations: Some recommendations... &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:18&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mTrending items: Some trending items... &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:18&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mLatest deals: Some latest deals... &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:18&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mAll async tasks have completed! &amp#27;[0;39m

testcase.name: testSynchronousContinuationMethods
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[36m15:55:18&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32msynchronousContinuationMethods endpoint executed on thread: main &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:18&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mTask told to run async, executed on thread: ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1 &amp#27;[0;39m&amp#27;[36m15:55:18&amp#27;[0;39m &amp#27;[32mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m - &amp#27;[32mTask told to run sync, executed on thread: ForkJoinPool.commonPool-worker-1 &amp#27;[0;39m
